positioning: Advisory-assisted Operational Trust Infrastructure for SMB and mid-market leadership.
primary_workflow: Assessment -> Omega TrustMap -> Executive Operational Briefing -> Action Orchestration -> Organizational Memory -> Executive Reporting
service_mode: Advisory-assisted; simulation-supported; not presented as fully autonomous runtime governance.
trust_principles: Trust must be modeled, evidenced, assigned, governed, and reviewed.
AI is controlled before it acts, or it is not controlled at all.
implemented_v8: mobile-first Omega Operational Blue visual system
two-mode UX: orientation environment and operational environment
